title: Demo: add rate limiting to login
summary:
This is a built-in demo session so you can see diffreader without an agent.

Adds a simple in-memory rate limiter to the login handler (5 attempts per IP per minute) and switches the token response to an httpOnly cookie.

files.explanation: The rate limiter is in-memory, so it resets on restart and is per-process. Fine for the demo; production would use Redis.
